mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session SET title = #{title}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chat_session SET updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, model, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM chat_session WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, model, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM chat_session ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
